name: Artillery
description: Reworks Artillery for the New Ranged package while preserving the original Ballista control, double-shot and double-damage progression. Additionally, Ballista and Ammo Cart cannot lose more than 50% / 40% / 30% of their Health from a single attack at Basic / Advanced / Expert Artillery. Cannon and its Ammo Cart path cannot lose more than 40% / 30% / 20% of their Health from a single attack.
author: bew_
